command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time, sys
cmd = ['bun','test','./scripts/verify-m062-s03.test.ts','./scripts/verify-m062-s01.test.ts']
start = time.perf_counter()
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, text=True)
duration = int((time.perf_counter()-start)*1000)
print(f'__EXIT_CODE__={proc.returncode}')
print(f'__DURATION_MS__={duration}')
sys.exit(proc.returncode)
PY
